sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Zone: covered drive, uncovered combo & climb. Back reads bang-bend-bounce.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Linemen step playside. Covered (DL head-up or playside gap): drive him. Uncovered: combo the playside double, climb to the LB. Back aims playside A gap, reads bang / bend / bounce.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Shifty back with vision; he finds the hole and makes the line right.

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Stretch: reach playside, press the edge, bend-bang-bounce off the tackle block.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Full line stretches playside, reach the playside shoulder. Back presses the outside leg of the TE/tackle, then bounce, bang, or bend off the edge block.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: One-cut back with speed; press the edge, plant, go.

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Playside down-blocks + double, fullback kicks the force, backside guard pulls to the Mike.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Linemen read head-up to backside. Playside down-blocks, double team at the point of attack climbs to the backside LB. Kicker (FB or TE) kicks the force; backside guard pulls. Trap = pull to kick, wrap = pull through the hole to the playside LB. One-back versions: no kicker, lane stays tight and vertical off the double.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Downhill power back; the line builds the hole and hands him the map.

name: COUNTER (GT)
subtitle: TWO PULLERS: G KICKS · T WRAPS

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Playside down-blocks; backside guard kicks the edge, backside tackle wraps the Mike. Back counter-steps.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Playside down-blocks; backside guard pulls to kick the force, backside tackle pulls and wraps to the playside LB. Back jab-steps away, then follows the wrapper through the B gap.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Patient back with burst; sell the jab, then hit it downhill.

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Two double teams move the line, no pullers. The back reads the Mike and hits the crease.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Power without the puller: vertical double teams at both interior defenders, TE seals the edge, backside tackle hinges. Nobody blocks the Mike; the back reads him and breaks opposite.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Decisive downhill back; one read, one cut, square pads.

name: ISO
subtitle: BASE BLOCKS · LEAD AT THE BACKER

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Man blocking across the front, fullback isolates the playside backer, back follows him downhill.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Every lineman base-blocks the man over him; uncovered linemen climb. The fullback meets the playside LB in the hole and the back follows his hat. One-back versions hit the same lane as a quick dive.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: North-south hammer; follow the lead block, fall forward.

name: TRAP
subtitle: INFLUENCE · TRAP THE FIRST DL INSIDE

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: The line blocks down and invites penetration, then the backside guard traps the first defender past center.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Playside DL is invited upfield (influence), the backside guard pulls short and kicks him from the inside out. Center and playside guard block back; tackles climb or hinge. Hits fast behind the trap block.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Quick-trigger back; the hole opens and closes in a blink.

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: The line sets like a pass to invite the rush upfield, then the back takes it downhill through the vacated lane.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Five-man pass set, receivers clear out, QB shows pass. The back delays, takes the handoff, and runs the lane the rush vacated. Blockers ride the rushers past the play.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Patient back with vision; let the rush beat itself.

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Playside pins down, guard and center pull around, the back takes the pitch and outruns the box.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Playside blockers pin their inside men, the playside guard and center pull around the edge for the force and the first backer. The back catches the toss already moving and presses the corner.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Speed back; win the corner, the pullers handle the rest.

name: READ OPTION
subtitle: GIVE OR KEEP · READ THE BACKSIDE END

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Zone blocking with the backside end unblocked. He crashes, the QB keeps; he sits, the back gets it.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Inside zone up front with the backside end left for the QB's eyes. Mesh rides until the read declares: end crashes flat down the line, QB pulls and replaces him; end stays home, give and the zone hits as called.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Zone back plus a QB who actually keeps it honest.

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Nobody blocks the pitch key. The QB attacks his shoulder and pitches off his answer; the back keeps the relation.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Reach blocking with the playside edge unblocked: he is the pitch key. QB attacks his upfield shoulder at full speed; key takes the QB, the ball is pitched; key widens with the pitch, QB turns up inside him.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Pitch back with wheels; hold the relation, finish the corner.

name: POWER READ
subtitle: SWEEP OR KEEP · READ THE FORCE

sections.heading: The scheme
sections.body: Power blocking with the force unblocked. The sweep stretches him; if he runs with it the QB pulls and hits the B gap.

sections.heading: Blocking rules
sections.body: Power up front (down blocks, backside guard pulls) but nobody kicks the force: the sweep path stretches him instead. Force chases the sweep, QB pulls and follows the puller through the B gap; force squeezes, the sweep wins the corner.

sections.heading: Back profile
sections.body: Jet-speed sweeper plus a downhill QB.
